channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Renowned Actor Sam Neill Passes Away at 78
item.description: Sam Neill, the acclaimed actor best known for his role as Dr. Alan Grant in the 1993 blockbuster 'Jurassic Park,' has passed away at the age of 78. His family confirmed his death on July 13, 2026, sta...

item.title: Veteran actor Sam Neill dies aged 78, leaving legacy of iconic roles and family life
item.description: Veteran actor Sam Neill, best known for his role as Dr. Alan Grant in the Jurassic Park franchise, has passed away at the age of 78. The New Zealand-born actor, who also appeared in films like Godzill...

item.title: SADC Ministers Address Regional Security Challenges in DRC, Mozambique, and Madagascar
item.description: Regional security experts from the Southern African Development Community (SADC) have convened in Malawi to address escalating security concerns in the Democratic Republic of Congo (DRC), Madagascar, ...

item.title: Counter-terrorism police investigate alleged murder of Ann Widdecombe
item.description: British counter-terrorism police are leading the investigation into the alleged murder of former Conservative minister Ann Widdecombe, following new evidence suggesting a terrorist motive. Widdecombe,...

item.title: Supreme Court revises citizenship cases and suspends Tamil Nadu cow slaughter ban
item.description: The Supreme Court has overturned the Gauhati High Court's decision to declare 27 individuals as foreigners, remanding their cases to tribunals for fresh adjudication. The bench emphasized that determi...

item.title: JD Vance's Iran Policy Falters as Trump and Ukraine Stance Diverge
item.description: The article discusses Vice President JD Vance's struggling Iran policy and its implications amid political tensions. Allysia Finley, a Wall Street Editorial Board member, criticizes Vance's failed eff...

item.title: Safa Presidential Candidate Zungu Gains Regional Support Ahead of September Election
item.description: Sandile Zungu, Safa presidential candidate and AmaZulu chairman, has expressed confidence in his campaign's momentum ahead of the September 12 elections. Zungu acknowledges the need for continued effo...

item.title: Senator Escudero Proposes Adjusted Schedule for Sara Duterte Impeachment Trial
item.description: Senator Francis 'Chiz' Escudero, who presides over the impeachment court, has proposed adjusting the schedule for the impeachment trial of Vice President Sara Duterte. He suggested holding the trial i...

item.title: Pension funds face criticism over poor customer service and stalled regulations
item.description: A survey commissioned by Super Consumers Australia has revealed that major pension funds, including AustralianSuper, are failing to meet basic customer service standards. Call centre data shows only o...

item.title: Court Dismisses Sowore's Request to Extend Trial Delay
item.description: The Federal High Court in Abuja has turned down Omoyele Sowore's request to delay his trial over alleged cyberbullying of President Tinubu. Justice Mohammed Umar ordered Sowore to return to court on J...

item.title: Affordable Mabati Home Building Tips for Kenyan Budget Builders
item.description: Building a home on a tight budget in Kenya requires careful planning, smart material choices, and attention to design details. For first-time builders, prioritizing essential features like room sizes,...

item.title: UK Police Arrest 12 Over Terror Threat to Tablighi Jamaat Event
item.description: Twelve individuals have been arrested in the UK over a right-wing terror threat targeting an Islamic event organized by the Tablighi Jamaat at Shrubland Hall in Suffolk. The police preemptively ended ...

item.title: Cage The Elephant Reflect on Mental Health and New Music with 'Beaches in Tennessee'
item.description: Cage The Elephant have released their first new music in two years, 'Beaches in Tennessee', marking a 'new chapter' in their career. The track, built around Brad Shultz's guitar, features Matt Shultz'...

item.title: Epstein Survivors Criticize Todd Blanche's Handling of Files During Confirmation Hearing
item.description: Acting U.S. Attorney General Todd Blanche faces intense scrutiny during his Senate confirmation hearing, with Epstein survivors and Democratic lawmakers poised to challenge his handling of the controv...

item.description: President Samia Suluhu Hassan addressed the 2026 Annual General Meeting of the Association of Government Solicitors and Legal Officers in Arusha, reaffirming Tanzania's commitment to human rights and ...

item.title: Marcos' Net Satisfaction Rises Slightly in June According to SWS Survey
item.description: The latest Social Weather Stations (SWS) survey released on July 13, 2026, indicates that President Ferdinand Marcos Jr.'s net satisfaction rating improved from -15 in March to -7 in June. The survey,...

item.title: Kenya's Bank Codes 2026: Essential Guide for Customers
item.description: Kenya's banking system has evolved significantly, with 47 licensed institutions as of 2026, including 38 commercial banks, 8 microfinance banks, and 1 development bank. Understanding bank codes is cru...

item.title: Naomi Klein Apologizes for Praise of Politician with Controversial Past
item.description: Canadian author and activist Naomi Klein has issued an apology for praising Graham Platner, a Democratic Senate candidate in Maine, despite his history of sexual misconduct allegations and a Nazi SS e...

item.title: France and Spain Set for High-Stakes World Cup Semi-Final Clash
item.description: France faces Spain in a crucial FIFA World Cup 2026 semi-final, with both teams vying for a place in the final. Didier Deschamps' squad aims to extend their dominance, having reached the final in five...

item.title: The Rolling Stones: Navigating Relationships and Legacy Through Decades
item.description: This article delves into the tumultuous personal lives of The Rolling Stones, highlighting their chaotic relationships and how these dynamics shaped their legacy. From Brian Jones' early influence as ...
